features: Clinically proven cavity and enamel protection
Combines the oral care science of Colgate with nature’s best herbs for healthier teeth and gums
The green stripe contains an exclusive blend of chamomile,
The toothpaste contains fluoride and calcium to fight cavities.
description: Product description Colgate herbal toothpaste combines the oral science of Colgate with nature's best herbs for healthier teeth and gums. The green stripe contains an exclusive blend of chamomile, eucalyptus, myrrh and sage. The white paste contains flouride and calcium to fight cavities. Directions Apply a pea-sized amount to a toothbrush, Brush teeth thoroughly for two minutes, Rinse mouth thoroughly Safety Warning Keep the product out of reach of children, avoid swallowing and seek medical advice in case of accidental ingestion. See more
